title: FAMILY SERVICES - 211info
text: ST LUKE CATHOLIC CHURCH FAMILY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial assistance with medical care, prescriptions, past due electric, natural gas, and water bills. Does not provide assistance with gasoline, rent, or propane. Assistance is dependent upon available funding and is not guaranteed. This resource may only be accessed once in a 12 month period. 417 Harrison Street Woodburn, OR 97071 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: By appointment only (971) 338-1074 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 338-1074 Message phone Message phone (971) 338-1074 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call and leave a message with name, phone number, and type of assistance being requested. Calls are returned within 72 hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of residence LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Aurora, Donald, Gervais, Hubbard, and Woodburn (Marion County only) TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Office and food pantry is located at the St. Luke Catholic Church campus. Enter the parking lot through the Harrison Street entrance and go to the brick building behind the church on the right. Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Medical Care Expense Assistance Prescription Expense Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST LUKE CATHOLIC CHURCH
